first.before: From October 2019 to May 2024, I completed the “Moscow 1” training program at
first.after: and became a certified Feldenkrais practitioner.

text.second: Since 2021, I have been teaching group classes of Awareness Through Movement® (ATM), and since 2024 I have also been offering individual sessions.
text.third: I continue to study and grow professionally through postgraduate seminars and additional training programs.
text.fourth: The deeper I go into the method, the more it continues to surprise and inspire me.
